data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"615f-fad3","generatedAt":"2026-04-11T04:27:24.373922Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Sprint SC coverage validation: verify all epic success criteria are covered by children","description":"When /dso:sprint begins executing an epic, Phase 1 Preplanning Gate checks children ambiguity but never validates children collectively cover all epic SCs. Gaps go undetected until completion verifier runs at sprint close.","successCriteria":["Sprint Phase 1 runs 3-tier SC coverage check before Phase 3 batch preparation","Haiku confirms only SCs it can cite a covering child for; others escalated to sonnet","Sonnet evaluates escalated SCs independently, returns COVERED/MISSING/UNSURE","Opus final arbiter for UNSURE, returns COVERED or MISSING; COVERED-preferred","MISSING SCs trigger REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage comment and routing to preplanning/implementation-plan","All COVERED \u2192 sprint proceeds to Phase 3 without preplanning","Tests cover each tier routing logic including 5-SC/3-covered integration test","Dedicated prompt files for each tier with input/output schemas"]},"stories":[{"id":"3812-d606","title":"As a sprint orchestrator, I can invoke 3-tier SC coverage agents with prompt files defining input/output contracts per tier","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, haiku prompt file exists with citation-required contract","When complete, sonnet prompt file exists with independent eval contract","When complete, opus prompt file exists with COVERED-preferred contract","When complete, each prompt file defines input format","When complete, each prompt file defines JSON output schema"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] 3 new prompt files increase surface area; consider shared base template"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":"foundation","splitPairId":"d751-731a","blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"Dedicated prompt files for each tier with input/output schemas"},{"id":"d751-731a","title":"As a sprint orchestrator, I can validate high-confidence SC coverage in Phase 1 using haiku citation-based check","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, sprint Phase 1 invokes haiku before Phase 3","When complete, all SCs cited-covered \u2192 proceed to Phase 3","When complete, parse failure \u2192 skip + warn (fail-open)","When complete, 0-SC epics \u2192 trivially pass with warning","When complete, gate is idempotent on ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Use sub-step number to avoid shifting existing step numbering","[Performance] Haiku fast path minimizes latency"],"scopeSplitCandidate":true,"splitRole":"foundation","splitPairId":"536e-3683","blockedBy":["3812-d606"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Sprint Phase 1 runs 3-tier SC coverage check before Phase 3 batch preparation"},{"id":"536e-3683","title":"As a sprint orchestrator, I can escalate unconfirmed SCs through sonnet and opus and route MISSING SCs to the correct decomposition skill","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, haiku-uncited SCs passed to sonnet with no haiku context","When complete, UNSURE SCs passed to opus; opus returns COVERED/MISSING only","When complete, MISSING SCs trigger REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage conforming to contract","When complete, routing reads child types and routes correctly","When complete, tests cover all tier routing paths","When complete, integration test (5-SC/3-covered) passes","When complete, fail-open test for malformed tier output passes"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Sonnet dispatch must strip haiku context at data layer","[Testing] All tier tests must use deterministic mock responses"],"scopeSplitCandidate":true,"splitRole":"enhancement","splitPairId":"d751-731a","blockedBy":["d751-731a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Sonnet/opus escalation paths + MISSING routing + test suite"},{"id":"b09a-4204","title":"Update project docs to reflect SC coverage validation gate in sprint Phase 1","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, replan-observability.md includes sc_coverage trigger type","When complete, CLAUDE.md Named-agent table updated if named agents created","When complete, no stale docs about sprint Phase 1 gate flow"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["3812-d606","d751-731a","536e-3683"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation updates"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["3812-d606","d751-731a","536e-3683","b09a-4204"]}}
